channel.title: Outsea Picks
channel.description: Honest reviews and affiliate picks for smart overseas shopping

item.title: Best Portable Chargers for Travel (2026) — Anker vs Belkin vs Apple MagSafe
item.description: An honest travel power bank guide for overseas shoppers—Anker 20K 87W vs Belkin 10K vs Apple MagSafe Battery, who each fits, and what not to overpay for.

item.title: Dyson HD17 Hair Dryer Guide (2026) — Is Supersonic r™ Worth It?
item.description: An honest guide to the Dyson HD17 (Supersonic r™) for overseas shoppers—vs Nural and classic Supersonic, who should buy, and purchase links.

item.title: Dyson Vacuum Buyer’s Guide (2026) — Which Model Is Worth It?
item.description: An honest guide to Dyson cordless vacuums for overseas shoppers—V8 vs V12 vs V15, who should buy, and where affiliate deals matter less than fit.
